commands.summary: Governance validation passed with the new validate_release_label rule wired in and no VERSION, suite_version, or adopter-fleet change.
All conformance cases passed, including the new valid-release-label accept case and the release-label-version-mismatch reject case; bidirectional coverage holds for SPEC-4-release-label.
Focused conformance tests passed, including exact fixture-directory declaration and reference-suite agreement with the two added fixtures.
SPEC derived blocks regenerated without drift; the RELEASE_LABEL prose lives in hand-written normative regions.
All 112 unit tests passed across every module (test_conformance, test_validate_repo, test_fleet_verify, test_plan_import_links, test_takeover_refs) with the two declared formal-model tests skipped.
